reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Mala atención. Esperamos para cargar porque estaba el camión. Hicimos la cola u cuandp salio elel camion vino uno de enfrentre...se coló y los playeros nada... muy mala atención del personal. Nada para comer...solo sandwich. No la recomiendo...

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. Terrible service. We waited to fill up because the truck was there. We got in line, and when the truck finally left, another one came along and cut in, and the attendants did nothing... the staff was incredibly rude. Nothing to eat... just sandwiches. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16090706033176576823/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNTlTbml3RRAB
